title: Resolve naming drift between BrandBuild and ai-video-studio
description: Decide whether package names, README branding, and internal labels should stay mixed or be aligned intentionally.
notes: User has already said the two labels are the same product family; this is an intentional cleanup decision, not a bug by default.

title: Keep BYOR-owned runtime features out of BrandBuild
description: Prevent reintroduction of roof-measure or other BYOR-owned runtime features into the canonical BrandBuild repo.
notes: Boundary script is now the first line of defense.

title: Track unrelated local modifications separately
description: Review or isolate unrelated local changes already present in the repo so they do not get conflated with the roof-measure cleanup.
notes: These changes predated the memory initialization and should be tracked independently.

title: Push BrandBuild cleanup upstream
description: Send the roof-measure cleanup and project-memory initialization to origin/main.
